subject: [PATCH v4 03/11] mm: handle PMD swap entries in fork path

2026-07-13.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of PMD swap entries in the fork path by teaching copy_huge_pmd() and copy_huge_non_present_pmd() to duplicate swap entries instead of splitting them, preserving transparent huge pages (THPs). It also introduces a new API for duplicating multiple swap slots at once and adds retry logic for table allocation failures. The changes mirror those made for PTEs in the same path.
